title: Register now for the upcoming webinar “The road to the marketplace”!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

Me and my team have been interacting with you guys a lot, and we realized that developers don’t know what to expect in their journeys when building an app with us.
Let’s change that!

I want to invite you to join us on Thursday, December 15th at 10:00 EST for our “The road to the apps marketplace” webinar

In this webinar, I will talk about the path to adding an app to the marketplace, and the great opportunity developers have here!

Topics:

  • Current status of the apps marketplace
  • How to come up with a great idea for an app
  • App features
  • Pricing and monetization
  • Building and review process

Please complete this short registration form if you would like to attend.

I hope to see you there!

posts.author: NickNourishandSow (Nick Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml: I won’t be able to attend live unfortunately, but I have registered in hopes that a recording will be available to registrants. Hope that’s the case. Thanks for putting this on!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @NickNourishandSow!

Yes. The recording will be sent to everyone who registers to the webinar

Cheers,
Matias
